title: MineFarms
description: MineFarms Trading and farming that add lot of recipes to farm productions, also has its own Trade ATM Machine
body:
Minefarms is a new Mod that add lot of recipes to farm productions, also has its own Trade ATM Machine , this machine is auto trader with one Click

You can put a hopper on the ATM Block to take lot of stacks

Basically it should work with any Economy Mod

Tested on Economy inc mod

Also the Mod Contains Deco Blocks and A BOX Chest , a MineFarms Contract Item you can do things with it with other mods

 

Prices and variables are in the config file , you can change prices and economy command in the file , also if you have scoreboard , it will add +1 to a scoreboard when a player

Sell's Energy Drink Box to the MineFarms ATM

 

Note: MineFarms Mod Works Great with Immersive engineering for mass production , Also MrCrayfish Mod



 Lot Of Changes to make things Easy for MineFarms 1.1

Removed all Prices from Config ,

Now OP can change the prices Globaly inside the MineFarms Atm Machine , OP Menu , Op Level can be changed in the Config File , Default  "OpLevel": "4"

Economy Command Now can be changed inside MineFarms Atm Machine All Changes Are Globaly

added command /market  for players to see the Prices

added command /minefarmsinfo for OP to check Config File info

Players can now add Thier Server Names to all MineFarms GUI , edit config file

Scoreboard added to config file default is "MineFarms" can be changed  , Note: Scores added to players Who sells the Energy Drink cause Energy Drink is Expensive to make


Please feel free to comment, and any suggestion you need to be added

 

Thank you

IVEN

DISCORD : IVEN#2107
